caption: The video displays a black screen filled with small, glowing gold particles that resemble stars or dust floating in space. Centered on the left and right sides of the screen are two identical vertical lists of white text. Each list contains the same sequence of words: "XAU", "HUI", "GDX", "DOLLAR", "BONDS", "RAND", and the phrase "and 25 different mining equities" at the bottom. The scene remains static across all frames, with the text staying in a fixed position while the golden particles drift slightly in the background. There are no people, clothing, or physical equipment present, only the floating golden specks against the dark void and the duplicated lists of financial tickers and assets.
